description_long: This is a wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown hexagonal shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored horizontal wooden planks, with visible interlocking log corners and metal fasteners. The cabin features multiple rectangular windows with grid muntins, arranged in symmetrical groupings on the longer facades. One side of the cabin has a single wooden door, slightly ajar, providing access to the interior. The structure is elevated above the ground on short concrete or stone piers, suggesting protection from moisture and improved stability. The overall design is simple and functional, evoking a rustic yet orderly appearance suitable for residential or recreational use.
description: A light wooden cabin with a reddish-brown gable roof, multiple grid windows, and a single door, elevated on short piers. The design is rustic and symmetrical, with interlocking log corners and visible fasteners.
description_view_0: This view shows a long side of the cabin with a single grid window and no visible door, highlighting the horizontal wood planks and roof shingles.
description_view_1: This view displays the gable end with three grid windows, two larger and one smaller, arranged symmetrically across the facade.
description_view_2: This view reveals the opposite long side, featuring a single open wooden door and a grid window, emphasizing the entry point.
description_view_3: This view shows the plain gable end with no windows or doors, only the horizontal wood planks and roof structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in reddish-brown hexagonal asphalt shingles, no overhangs or dormers visible
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows with grid muntins; one long side has a single window, the opposite long side has a single window and a door, and one gable end has three windows (two large, one small) arranged symmetrically
attribute_door_placement: One single wooden door located on the long side of the cabin, offset to the left when facing the facade with the door and window
